nasb.text: For I,’ declares the Lord, ‘will be a wall of fire around her, and I will be the glory in her midst.’ ”

esv.text: And I will be to her a wall of fire all around, declares the Lord, and I will be the glory in her midst.’”

cnv.text: 耶和華說：我要作耶路撒冷四圍的火牆和城中的榮耀。’”

ccb.text: 耶和华说，我要成为一堵火墙环绕耶路撒冷，作城中的荣耀。’
